trivia_bullets.text: Omen of the Dead is part of the five-card Omen cycle in THB, one enchantment per color: Omen of the Sun (white), Omen of the Sea (blue), Omen of the Dead (black), Omen of the Forge (red), and Omen of the Hunt (green). All five have Flash, an ETB effect, and a sacrifice-for-Scry-2 mode. The cycle was designed to function as both Constellation triggers and pseudo-instant utility, feeding the set's Flash-matters subtheme.
sources: WebSearch snippet: Star City Games / Wizards mechanics article

trivia_bullets.text: At {B} with Flash, Omen of the Dead is one of the cheapest reanimation effects in Pauper and Pioneer, functioning as instant-speed creature recovery that also enters as an enchantment for Constellation value. Hipsters of the Coast rated it C but noted 'a ton of utility here for one mana' across Flash-matters, Constellation, and Devotion strategies.
sources: Hipsters of the Coast: Every Common in Theros Beyond Death Reviewed

trivia_bullets.text: Flavor text: 'My time will come, when life's frantic striving will fade into the boundless quiet of death.' Speaker is unattributed in this printing. The line reads as a mortal's meditation on death's inevitability, fitting the card's mechanical theme of accepting the graveyard as a resource rather than a loss.

related_cards.name: Omen of the Sun
related_cards.note: White cycle member; Flash enchantment creating two 1/1 Soldiers and gaining 2 life

related_cards.name: Omen of the Sea
related_cards.note: Blue cycle member; Flash enchantment that scrys 2 and draws a card

related_cards.name: Omen of the Forge
related_cards.note: Red cycle member; Flash enchantment dealing 2 damage to any target

related_cards.name: Omen of the Hunt
related_cards.note: Green cycle member; Flash enchantment that searches for a basic land
